completionGate.statement: Not achieved until this goal's work ships as a PR driven to mergeable via /yeet (bun run beep yeet: repair -> verify -> publish --pr -> monitor).
completionGate.grandfatheredNote: Completion predates the 2026-06-30 PR-mergeable gate; not reopened.

catalog.note: P3 complete 2026-06-17T23:55:39Z: 16 closed in Codex (14 false_positive, 2 wontfix); 55 remediate open. | P7 complete 2026-06-18: PR #254 merged to main (dc2e44fb70); all 56 live open Codex findings closed as fixed via aardvark API (55 remediate + 1 new turbo.json passThroughEnv finding fixed in PR). STILL_OPEN=0.

dispositionPolicy.fixPhilosophy: minimal scoped fixes by default; >=2 findings sharing a class may propose one canonical helper (repo-exports search first; foundation home) as a distinct GATE-1 row before any cross-lane edit

sanitation.publicFindingPolicy: Unremediated findings keep exploit detail, specific evidence paths, source commits, and proposed patches outside the public branch until fixes land atomically. Tracked ledgers carry title + severity + disposition + justification.

lanePolicy.mechanism: partition findings by file-ownership into non-overlapping parallel lanes; serialize overlapping ones; no git worktrees

phases.name: bootstrap
phases.exit: Packet scaffolded on security/6-17-2026; gitignore + supersede done; manifest/index/triage stubs valid.

phases.name: extract
phases.exit: All 71 findings captured (Report + Patch) to the private raw root; sanitized markdown + INDEX committed; capturedCount == 71.

phases.name: triage
phases.exit: Every finding has a disposition + verdict + lane; lanes partition all remediate findings; INDEX reconciles.

phases.name: approval-gate
phases.exit: Human approves the disposition matrix + shared-helper proposals. STOP until approved; meta.gateApprovedAt set.

phases.name: close-invalids
phases.exit: Chrome pass 1: every non-remediate disposition closed in Codex with its reason + context.

phases.name: lane-partition
phases.exit: Conflict graph colored; lanes + serializedChains recorded; each remediate finding assigned a lane.

phases.name: remediate-by-lane
phases.exit: Every remediate finding fixed; targeted verification recorded in triage.json (changedFiles + verificationCommand).

phases.name: yeet-to-mergeable
phases.exit: bun run beep yeet green incl. security lanes; PR open and mergeable; review bot pass; 0 unresolved threads.

phases.name: merge-gate
phases.exit: Human approves before merge; PR merged.

phases.name: close-remediated
phases.exit: Chrome pass 2: all remediated findings marked 'Already fixed' with PR evidence; all 71 closed.

phases.name: closeout
phases.exit: INDEX/manifest/triage reconciled; closeout reflection written; packet status updated.

stopConditions: Post-triage GATE 1: disposition matrix is not yet human-approved.
Pre-merge GATE 2: PR merge is not yet human-approved.
A finding would be set to 'Won't fix' without explicit written justification.
Sanitization scan finds a secret in tracked files, or the cookie file is staged.
Enumerated Codex finding count does not equal 71.
A remediation fix would require editing a file outside its lane without an approved shared-helper row.
Required source files are missing or materially contradictory.
The same blocker repeats after reasonable investigation.
